content.name: Simple Reader & Analyzer
content.description: A minimal example that reads a text file and performs basic analysis.

target_file.description: Path to the file to analyze

content.system_prompt: You are a text analysis agent. Follow the blueprint strictly.

content.instruction: Execute blueprints['main'] to analyze the target file.

blueprints.main: graph TD; start[Start] --> read[Read File]; read --> check{Is Empty?}; check -->|Yes| error[Report Empty]; check -->|No| analyze[Count Words]; analyze --> summary[Generate Summary]

error.step1: echo 'Error: File is empty or missing!'
